creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->ohauer

Hi, 

can you tell me what's the different between your source file and the 
official from sf.net? 

If it is about the dos linefeeds, we can fix it in the ports Makefile 
USE_DOS2UNIX=   yes 
DOS2UNIX_REGEX= .*(css|rb|txt|RELEASE_NOTES)$$ 

Pls. for a pkg-plist it is not enough to rm the directoy if 
the docs are installed in a different place, but I will look into this.
